_meta.source: Synthetic fixture. Shape mirrors SAM.gov sources-sought / RFI / market research notice records. Used because Bubba's SAM key lacks Contract Opportunities API access (AUDIT_REPORT §8). All values illustrative; no live data.

notices.title: Off-road autonomous ground perception for robotic combat vehicles
notices.synopsis: PEO Ground Combat Systems seeks industry input on perception stacks for off-road autonomy and unmanned ground vehicles supporting RCV integration.

notices.title: UGV autonomy stack integration: open architecture and modular payloads
notices.synopsis: Sources sought for open architecture autonomous ground vehicle payloads and robotic combat vehicle modules.

notices.title: Robotic combat vehicle off-road perception benchmarking
notices.synopsis: Market survey for off-road autonomy perception benchmarking and UGV integration readiness.

notices.title: Onboard rendezvous and proximity operations for space domain awareness
notices.synopsis: Space Systems Command seeks RPO autonomy with onboard decision provenance for SDA missions.

notices.title: Rendezvous proximity operations decision provenance and onboard autonomy
notices.synopsis: USSF SSC requests information on space domain awareness analytics, rpo autonomy, and onboard autonomy for resilient PWSA architectures.

notices.title: Space domain awareness analytics for SDA constellations
notices.synopsis: Market survey for SDA analytics, orbit determination, and RPO mission decision provenance across PWSA-class constellations.

notices.title: Edge data fusion for kill web composability
notices.synopsis: AFLCMC Battle Network Directorate seeks edge computing data fusion solutions to support CJADC2 and kill web composability.

notices.title: Trustworthy AI assurance for autonomous decisions in DDIL environments
notices.synopsis: Information Innovation Office requests information on attestable inference and verifiable AI infrastructure for tactical autonomy in DDIL.

notices.title: Trustworthy AI evaluation and attestation
notices.synopsis: AFRL Information Directorate seeks data fusion and trustworthy AI evaluation tooling.
